name: agent-chat-plugin
description: Peer AI agents coordinate through markdown messages in shared channel folders — group chat / blackboard, no orchestrator, autonomous zero-token waiting, cross-platform.

AGENT_CHAT_NAME.title: Agent identity
AGENT_CHAT_NAME.description: This session's name in the chat (e.g. claude-1). Required for the inbox hook.

AGENT_CHAT_CHANNELS.title: Channels to watch
AGENT_CHAT_CHANNELS.description: Comma-separated channels checked at session start. Empty = all.
